</tbody></table>
   </ix:nonNumeric>
   <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The fair value of the building was determined based on the income approach, which considered the discounted cash flows and direct capitalization analysis, and the sales comparison approach. The fair value of land was determined based on the sales comparison approach. The fair value of the in-place leases was determined primarily based on the analysis of the economic benefits of certain cost savings&#xa0;attributable to the leases.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The building is depreciated over a useful life of&#xa0;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2019-03-01_2019-03-31_PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis-BuildingMember" name="us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentUsefulLife" id="c69849519" format="ixt-sec:duryear">40</ix:nonNumeric>&#xa0;years and the in-place leases are amortized over the average remaining lease terms of&#xa0;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2019-03-01_2019-03-31_FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetsByMajorClassAxis-LeasesAcquiredInPlaceMember" name="us-gaap:FiniteLivedIntangibleAssetUsefulLife" id="c69849520" format="ixt-sec:duryear">3.5</ix:nonNumeric>&#xa0;years.</p>
  </ix:nonNumeric>
  <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
  <div>
   &#xa0;
  </div>
  <ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31" name="mpwr:LeasesDisclosureTextBlock" id="c1758480" escape="true">
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><em style="font: inherit;">7.</em> LEASES</b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b>&#xa0;</b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>Lessee</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company has operating leases primarily for administrative and sales and marketing offices, manufacturing operations and research and development facilities, employee housing units and certain equipment. These leases have remaining lease terms from less than a year&#xa0;to&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">five</em>&#xa0;years. Some of these leases include options to renew the lease term for up to&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849523">two</span>&#xa0;years or on a month-to-month basis. The Company does <em style="font: inherit;">not</em> have finance lease arrangements.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">As of <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020 </em>and <em style="font: inherit;">2019</em><i>,&#xa0;</i>operating lease ROU assets totaled $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849526" contextRef="i_2020-12-31_BalanceSheetLocationAxis-OtherAssetsMember" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAsset" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">3.7</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million and $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849527" contextRef="i_2019-12-31_BalanceSheetLocationAxis-OtherAssetsMember" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAsset" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">2.9</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million, respectively. As of <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020 </em>and <em style="font: inherit;">2019</em><i>,&#xa0;</i>operating lease liabilities totaled $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849529" contextRef="i_2020-12-31_BalanceSheetLocationAxis-OtherLiabilitiesMember" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiability" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">3.1</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million and $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849530" contextRef="i_2019-12-31_BalanceSheetLocationAxis-OtherLiabilitiesMember" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiability" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">2.4</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million, respectively. The following tables summarize certain information related to the leases (in thousands, except percentages):</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>

   <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">As of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020, </em>the Company had additional operating leases that have <em style="font: inherit;">not</em> yet commenced with future lease obligations of $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849539" contextRef="i_2020-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="mpwr:LesseeOperatingLeaseLeaseNotYetCommencedFutureLeaseObligations" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">4.6</ix:nonFraction> million. The leases will commence in various periods in <em style="font: inherit;">2021</em> with lease terms ranging from less than <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849541">one</span> year to <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849542">four</span> years.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>Lessor</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company owns certain office buildings and leases a portion of these properties to&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">third</em><i>&#xa0;</i>parties under arrangements that are classified as operating leases. These leases have remaining lease terms ranging from&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849544">two</span> years&#xa0;to&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849545">four</span>&#xa0;years. Some of these leases include options to renew the lease term for up to&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849546">five</span>&#xa0;years.</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">For the years ended <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020 </em>and <em style="font: inherit;">2019</em><i>,</i>&#xa0;income related to lease payments was $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849548" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLeaseIncomeLeasePayments" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">1.9</ix:nonFraction> million and $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849549" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLeaseIncomeLeasePayments" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">1.8</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million, respectively.    <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><em style="font: inherit;">8.</em>&#xa0;&#xa0;STOCK-BASED COMPENSATION</b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b><em style="font: inherit;">2014</em>&#xa0;Equity Incentive Plan</b></i>&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> April 2013</em><i>,&#xa0;</i>the Board of Directors adopted the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2014</em>&#xa0;Equity Incentive Plan (the&#xa0;<i>&#x201c;</i><em style="font: inherit;">2014</em>&#xa0;Plan&#x201d;), which the Company's stockholders&#xa0;approved in&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> June 2013</em><i>.&#xa0;</i>In&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> October 2014</em><i>,&#xa0;</i>the Board of Directors approved certain amendments to the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2014</em>&#xa0;Plan. The&#xa0;amended&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2014</em>&#xa0;Plan became effective on&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> November 13, 2014</em><i>&#xa0;</i>and provided for the issuance of up to&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849556" contextRef="i_2014-11-13_PlanNameAxis-The2014PlanMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardNumberOfSharesAuthorized" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">5.5</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million shares. In&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> April 2020</em><i>,&#xa0;</i>the Board of Directors further amended and restated the amended&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2014</em>&#xa0;Plan (the &#x201c;Amended and Restated&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2014</em><i>&#xa0;</i>Plan&#x201d;), which the Company's stockholders approved in&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> June 2020</em><i>.&#xa0;</i>The Amended and Restated&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2014</em>&#xa0;Plan became effective on&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> June 11, 2020</em><i>&#xa0;</i>and provides for the issuance of up to&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849560" contextRef="d_2020-06-11_2020-06-11_PlanNameAxis-AmendedAndRestated2014PlanMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardNumberOfAdditionalSharesAuthorized" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">10.5</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million&#xa0;shares. The&#xa0;Amended and Restated&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2014</em>&#xa0;Plan will expire on&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> June 11, 2030</em><i>.&#xa0;</i>As of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020</em><i>,&#xa0;</i><ix:nonFraction id="c69849562" contextRef="i_2020-12-31_PlanNameAxis-AmendedAndRestated2014PlanMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardNumberOfSharesAvailableForGrant" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-6">6.0</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million shares remained available for future issuance under the Amended&#xa0;and Restated&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2014</em>&#xa0;Plan.&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>

    <em style="font: inherit;">1</em>)&#xa0; &#xa0;Amount&#xa0;reflects the tax benefit related to stock-based compensation recorded&#xa0;for equity awards that are expected to generate&#xa0;tax deductions when they vest in future periods.

   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>RSUs</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The&#xa0;Company&#x2019;s RSUs include time-based RSUs, RSUs with performance conditions (&#x201c;PSUs&#x201d;), RSUs with market conditions (&#x201c;MSUs&#x201d;), and RSUs with both market and performance conditions (&#x201c;MPSUs&#x201d;). Vesting of awards with performance conditions or market conditions is subject to the achievement of pre-determined performance goals and the approval of such achievement by the Compensation Committee of the Board of Directors (the &#x201c;Compensation Committee&#x201d;). All awards include service conditions which require continued employment with the Company.</p>
   <p style="background-color:#FFFFFF;font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>

   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>

   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>Time-Based RSUs</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">For the years ended <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020, </em><em style="font: inherit;">2019</em> and <em style="font: inherit;">2018,</em> the Compensation Committee granted <ix:nonFraction id="c69849583" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-TimebasedRSUsMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">76,000</ix:nonFraction>, <ix:nonFraction id="c69849584" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-TimebasedRSUsMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">52,000</ix:nonFraction> and <ix:nonFraction id="c69849585" contextRef="d_2018-01-01_2018-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-TimebasedRSUsMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">133,000</ix:nonFraction> RSUs, respectively, with service conditions&#xa0;to non-executive employees and non-employee directors. The RSUs generally vest over&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849586">four</span>&#xa0;years for employees and&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849587">one</span>&#xa0;year for directors, subject to continued service&#xa0;with the Company.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>PSUs and MPSUs</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; "><em style="font: inherit;">2020</em> PSUs:</span></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> February 2020</em><i>,&#xa0;</i>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849589" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">100,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;PSUs to the executive officers, which represent a target number of shares to be earned based on the Company&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849590">two</span>-year (<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>&#xa0;and&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2021</em>) revenue growth rate compared against the analog industry&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">two</em>-year revenue growth rate as published by the Semiconductor Industry Association (<i>&#x201c;</i><em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an executive officer can earn is&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849595" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Pure" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0">300</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs.&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849597" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember_VestingAxis-VestingFirstQuarterOf2022IfPerformanceConditionsAreMetMember" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardAwardVestingRightsPercentage" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="1">50</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs will vest in the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">first</em>&#xa0;quarter of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2022</em>&#xa0;if the pre-determined performance goals are met during the&#xa0;performance period. The remaining&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs&#xa0;will vest over the following&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">two</em>&#xa0;years on a quarterly basis. Assuming the achievement of the highest level of performance goals, the total stock-based compensation cost for the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs is&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849604" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="USD" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">51.1</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>

   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> February 2020</em><i>,&#xa0;</i>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849606" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">30,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;PSUs to certain non-executive employees, which represent a target number of&#xa0;shares to be earned based on the Company&#x2019;s&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2021</em><i>&#xa0;</i>revenue goals for certain regions or product line divisions, or based on the Company&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849608">two</span>-year (<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>&#xa0;and&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2021</em>) revenue growth rate compared against the analog industry&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">two</em>-year revenue growth rate as published by the Semiconductor Industry Association (<em style="font: inherit;">&#x201c;2020</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an employee can earn is either&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849613" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Pure" name="mpwr:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMinimumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0">200</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;or&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849614" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Pure" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0">300</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em><i>&#xa0;</i>Non-Executive PSUs, depending on the job classification of the employee.&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849616" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember_VestingAxis-VestingFirstQuarterOf2020IfPerformanceConditionsAreMetMember" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardAwardVestingRightsPercentage" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="1">50</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs will vest in the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">first</em><i>&#xa0;</i>quarter of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2022</em>&#xa0;if the pre-determined performance goals are met during the performance period. The remaining&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs&#xa0;will vest over the following&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849621">two</span>&#xa0;years on an annual or quarterly basis. Assuming the achievement of the highest level of performance goals, the total stock-based compensation cost for the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em><i>&#xa0;</i>Non-Executive PSUs is&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849623" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="USD" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">12.8</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million.</p>
   <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs and the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em><i>&#xa0;</i>Non-Executive PSUs contain a purchase price feature, which requires the employees to pay the Company&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849626" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardPricePerSharePayableUponVestingOfEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptions" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">30</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;per share upon vesting of the shares.&#xa0;The&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">$30</em>&#xa0;purchase price requirement is deemed satisfied and waived if the average stock price for&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">20</em>&#xa0;consecutive trading days at any time during the performance period is&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">$30</em>&#xa0;higher than the grant date stock price of $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849630" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriodWeightedAverageGrantDateFairValue" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">182.62</ix:nonFraction>. This market condition was achieved in the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">second</em><i>&#xa0;</i>quarter of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020.</em>&#xa0;The Company determined the grant date fair value of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs and the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em><i>&#xa0;</i>Non-Executive PSUs using a Monte Carlo simulation model with the following assumptions: stock price of&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849635" contextRef="i_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">182.62</ix:nonFraction>,&#xa0;simulation term of&#xa0;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedTerm1" id="c69849636" format="ixt-sec:duryear">2.0</ix:nonNumeric>&#xa0;years, expected volatility of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849637" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedVolatilityRate" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3">33.6</ix:nonFraction>%, risk-free interest rate of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849638" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsRiskFreeInterestRate" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3">1.4</ix:nonFraction>%, and expected dividend yield of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849639" contextRef="d_2020-02-01_2020-02-29_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2020Member" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedDividendRate" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3">1.1</ix:nonFraction>%.&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; "><em style="font: inherit;">2020</em></span><span style="text-decoration: underline; ">&#xa0;MPSUs:</span></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><br /> In&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> July 2020</em><i>,&#xa0;</i>the Compensation Committee granted&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849641" contextRef="d_2020-07-01_2020-07-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2020Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">43,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;MPSUs to the executive officers and&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849642" contextRef="d_2020-07-01_2020-07-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2020Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-KeyEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">2,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;MPSUs&#xa0;to certain key employees, which represented a target number of shares that could be earned based on the achievement of both market and performance conditions (<em style="font: inherit;">&#x201c;2020</em>&#xa0;MPSUs&#x201d;).&#xa0; The maximum number of shares that an employee could earn was&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849644" contextRef="d_2020-07-01_2020-07-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2020Member" unitRef="Pure" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0">500</ix:nonFraction>% of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em><i>&#xa0;</i>MPSUs. The market conditions consisted of&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849646">five</span>&#xa0;stock price targets ranging from $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849647" contextRef="d_2020-07-01_2020-07-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2020Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardStockPriceTarget" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">260</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;to $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849648" contextRef="d_2020-07-01_2020-07-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2020Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardStockPriceTarget" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">300</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;with a performance period through&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> July 20, 2023</em><i>,</i><i>&#xa0;</i>and the through&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2021</em><i>.</i><i>&#xa0;</i>As of <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020, </em>the Company has achieved all <em style="font: shares were awarded to the employees. <ix:nonFraction id="c69849652" contextRef="d_2020-07-01_2020-07-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2020Member_VestingAxis-VestOnJuly2023Member" unitRef="Pure" period of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">one</em><i>&#xa0;</i>year. Based on the actual achievement of the market and performance goals, the total stock-based compensation cost for the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em><i>&#xa0;</i>MPSUs is&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849658" contextRef="d_2020-07-01_2020-07-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2020Member" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">42.1</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company determined the grant date fair value of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em><i>&#xa0;</i>MPSUs using a Monte Carlo simulation model with the following assumptions: stock price of&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849660" contextRef="i_2020-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2020Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">248.71</ix:nonFraction>,&#xa0;simulation term of&#xa0;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2020Member" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedTerm1" id="c69849661" format="ixt-sec:duryear">4.0</ix:nonNumeric>&#xa0;years, expected volatility of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849662" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2020Member" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedVolatilityRate" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3">38.8</ix:nonFraction>%, risk-free interest rate of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849663" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2020Member" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsRiskFreeInterestRate" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3">0.2</ix:nonFraction>%, and expected dividend yield of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849664" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2020Member" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedDividendRate" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3">0.8</ix:nonFraction>%.    <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; "><em style="font: inherit;">2019</em> PSUs:</span></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> February 2019,&#xa0;</em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849667" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">151,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;PSUs to the executive officers, which represented a target number of shares that could be earned based on the Company&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849668">two</span>-year (<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;and&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>) revenue growth rate compared against the analog industry&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">two</em>-year revenue growth rate as published by the Semiconductor Industry Association (<em style="font: inherit;">&#x201c;2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an executive officer could earn was&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849673" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Pure" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0">300</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs.&#xa0;Based on the actual revenue achievement at the end of the performance period, a total of <ix:nonFraction id="c69849675" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">454,000</ix:nonFraction> shares were awarded to the executive officers.&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849676" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember_VestingAxis-VestingFirstQuarterOf2021IfPerformanceConditionsAreMetMember" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardAwardVestingRightsPercentage" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="1">50</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs will vest in the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">first</em>&#xa0;quarter of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2021.</em> The remaining&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs&#xa0;will vest over the following&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">two</em>&#xa0;years on a quarterly basis. Based on the actual achievement of performance goals, the total stock-based compensation cost for the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs is&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849683" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="USD" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">46.6</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs contain a purchase price feature, which requires the employees to pay the Company&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849685" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardPricePerSharePayableUponVestingOfEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptions" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">30</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;per share upon vesting of the shares.&#xa0;Shares that do&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">not</em>&#xa0;vest will&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">not</em>&#xa0;be subject to the purchase price payment. The Company determined the grant date fair value of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs using the Black-Scholes model with the following assumptions: stock price of&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849689" contextRef="i_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">130.67</ix:nonFraction>,&#xa0;expected term of&#xa0;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedTerm1" id="c69849690" format="ixt-sec:duryear">2.6</ix:nonNumeric>&#xa0;years, expected volatility of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849691" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedVolatilityRate" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="2">29.0</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;and risk-free interest rate of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849692" contextRef="d_2019-02-01_2019-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsRiskFreeInterestRate" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3">2.5</ix:nonFraction>%.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> October 2018,&#xa0;</em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted <ix:nonFraction id="c69849693" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">53,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;PSUs to certain non-executive employees, which represented a target number of&#xa0;shares that could be earned based on the Company&#x2019;s&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>&#xa0;revenue goals for certain regions or product line divisions, or based on the Company&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849695">two</span>-year (<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;and&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em>) revenue growth rate compared against the analog industry&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">two</em>-year revenue growth rate as published by the Semiconductor Industry Association (<em style="font: inherit;">&#x201c;2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an employee could earn was either&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849700" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Pure" name="mpwr:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMinimumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0">200</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;or&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849701" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Pure" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0">300</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs, depending on the job classification of the employee. Based on the actual revenue achievement at the end of the performance period, a total of <ix:nonFraction id="c69849703" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">100,000</ix:nonFraction> shares were awarded to the employees.&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849704" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember_VestingAxis-VestingFirstQuarterOf2021IfPerformanceConditionsAreMetMember" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardAwardVestingRightsPercentage" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="1">50</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs will vest in the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">first</em>&#xa0;quarter of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2021.</em> The remaining&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs&#xa0;will vest over the following&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">two</em>&#xa0;years on an annual or quarterly basis. Based on the actual achievement of performance goals, the total stock-based compensation cost for the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs is&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849711" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="USD" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">8.1</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million.</p>

   <ix:exclude>&#xa0;</ix:exclude>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs contain a purchase price feature, which requires the employees to pay the Company&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849714" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardPricePerSharePayableUponVestingOfEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptions" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">30</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;per share upon vesting of the shares.&#xa0;Shares that do&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">not</em>&#xa0;vest will&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">not</em>&#xa0;be subject to the purchase price payment. The Company determined the grant date fair value of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs using the Black-Scholes model with the following assumptions: stock price of&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849718" contextRef="i_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">108.43</ix:nonFraction>,&#xa0;expected term of&#xa0;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedTerm1" id="c69849719" format="ixt-sec:duryear">2.9</ix:nonNumeric>&#xa0;years, expected volatility of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849720" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedVolatilityRate" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3">28.7</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;and risk-free interest rate of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849721" contextRef="d_2018-10-01_2018-10-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2019Member" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsRiskFreeInterestRate" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3">2.9</ix:nonFraction>%.&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; "><em style="font: inherit;">2018</em> PSUs:</span></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> February 2018,&#xa0;</em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849723" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">188,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;PSUs to the executive officers, which represented a target number of shares that could be earned based on the Company&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849724">two</span>-year (<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;and&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>) revenue growth rate compared against the analog industry&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">two</em>-year revenue growth rate as published by the Semiconductor Industry Association (<em style="font: inherit;">&#x201c;2018</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an executive officer could earn was&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849729" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Pure" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0">300</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs.&#xa0;&#xa0;Based on the actual revenue achievement at the end of the performance period, a total of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849731" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">558,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;shares were awarded to&#xa0;the executive officers. <ix:nonFraction id="c69849732" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember_VestingAxis-VestingFirstQuarterOf2020IfPerformanceConditionsAreMetMember" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardAwardVestingRightsPercentage" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="1">50</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs vested in the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">first</em>&#xa0;quarter of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020.</em> The remaining&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs&#xa0;vest over the following&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">two</em>&#xa0;years on a quarterly basis. Based on the actual achievement of the performance goals, the total stock-based compensation cost for the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs is&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849739" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="USD" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">45.6</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> February 2018,&#xa0;</em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849740" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">44,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;PSUs to certain non-executive employees, which represented a target number of&#xa0;shares that could be earned based on the Company&#x2019;s&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>&#xa0;revenue goals for certain regions or product line divisions, or based on the Company&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849742">two</span>-year (<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;and&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2019</em>) revenue growth rate compared against the analog industry&#x2019;s average&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">two</em>-year revenue growth rate as published by the Semiconductor Industry Association (<em style="font: inherit;">&#x201c;2018</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an employee could earn was either&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849747" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Pure" name="mpwr:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMinimumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0">200</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;or&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849748" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Pure" name="mpwr:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMinimumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0">300</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs, depending on the job classification of the employee.&#xa0;Based on the actual achievement at the end of the performance period, a total of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849750" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember_VestingAxis-VestingFirstQuarterOf2020IfPerformanceConditionsAreMetMember" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardAwardVestingRightsPercentage" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="1">50</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs vested in the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">first</em>&#xa0;quarter of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020.</em> The remaining&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs&#xa0;vest over the following&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">two</em>&#xa0;years on an annual or quarterly basis. Based on the actual achievement of performance goals, the total stock-based compensation cost for the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs is $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849758" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="USD" name="mpwr:MaximumStockCompensationCosts" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-6">6.0</ix:nonFraction> million.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs and the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs contain a purchase price feature, which requires the employees to pay the Company&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849761" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardPricePerSharePayableUponVestingOfEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptions" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">30</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;per share upon vesting of the shares.&#xa0;Shares that do&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">not</em>&#xa0;vest will&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">not</em>&#xa0;be subject to the purchase price payment. The Company determined the grant date fair value of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;Executive PSUs and the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2018</em>&#xa0;Non-Executive PSUs using the Black-Scholes model with the following assumptions: stock price of&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849766" contextRef="i_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="us-gaap:SharePrice" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">110.00</ix:nonFraction>,&#xa0;expected term of&#xa0;<ix:nonNumeric contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member" name="us-gaap:SharebasedCompensationArrangementBySharebasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedTerm1" id="c69849767" format="ixt-sec:duryear">2.6</ix:nonNumeric>&#xa0;years, expected volatility of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849768" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsExpectedVolatilityRate" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3">27.5</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;and risk-free interest rate of&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849769" contextRef="d_2018-02-01_2018-02-28_AwardTypeAxis-PSU2018Member" unitRef="Pure" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardFairValueAssumptionsRiskFreeInterestRate" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="3">2.3</ix:nonFraction>%.&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; "><em style="font: inherit;">2015</em> MPSUs:</span></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In <em style="font: inherit;"> December 2015,&#xa0;</em>the Compensation Committee&#xa0;granted&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849771" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-ExecutiveOfficerMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">86,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;MPSUs to the executive officers and&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849772" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_TitleOfIndividualAxis-NonExecutiveEmployeesMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsGrantsInPeriod" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">41,000</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;MPSUs to certain non-executive employees, which represented a target number of shares that could be earned upon achievement of both market conditions and performance conditions (<em style="font: inherit;">&#x201c;2015</em>&#xa0;MPSUs&#x201d;). The maximum number of shares that an employee could earn was&#xa0;<ix:nonFraction id="c69849774" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member" unitRef="Pure" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardEquityInstrumentsOtherThanOptionsMaximumPercentageAllowed" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0">500</ix:nonFraction>%&#xa0;of the target number of the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2015</em>&#xa0;MPSUs. The&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2015</em>&#xa0;MPSUs consisted of&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849777">four</span> separate tranches with various performance periods all ended&#xa0;on&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2019.&#xa0;</em>The&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">first</em>&#xa0;tranche contained market conditions only, which required the achievement of&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849779">five</span> stock price targets ranging from&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849780" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_RangeAxis-MinimumMember_VestingAxis-ShareBasedCompensationAwardTrancheOneMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">71.36</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;to&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849781" contextRef="d_2015-12-01_2015-12-31_AwardTypeAxis-MPSUs2015Member_RangeAxis-MaximumMember_VestingAxis-ShareBasedCompensationAwardTrancheOneMember" unitRef="USDPerShare" name="mpwr:MarketAwardsPriceTargets" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">95.57</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;with a performance period from&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> January 1, 2016&#xa0;</em>to&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2019.&#xa0;</em></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The second,&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">third</em>&#xa0;and&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">fourth</em>&#xa0;tranches contained both market and performance conditions. The <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849784">five</span> stock price targets for the&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">second</em>&#xa0;tranche ranged from&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849786"    <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In addition, each of the second,&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">third</em>&#xa0;and&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">fourth</em>&#xa0;tranches required the achievement of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">one</em>&#xa0;of following&#xa0;<span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849799">six</span>&#xa0;operating metrics:</p>

   <ix:exclude>&#xa0;</ix:exclude>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The following table summarizes the achievement of the market and performance conditions:</p>

   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>ESPP</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">Under the ESPP, eligible employees <em style="font: inherit;"> may </em>purchase common stock through payroll deductions. Participants <em style="font: inherit;"> may </em><em style="font: inherit;">not</em> purchase more than <ix:nonFraction id="c69849868" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="Share" style="font: inherit;">six</em>-month offering period, or purchase shares having a value greater than $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849870" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="Share" name="mpwr:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardMaximumNumberOfSharesPerEmployeeValue" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">25,000</ix:nonFraction> in any calendar year as measured at the beginning of the offering period in accordance with the Internal Revenue Code and applicable treasury regulations.&#xa0;The ESPP provides for an annual increase by an amount equal to the least of <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849871">one million</span> shares, <ix:nonFraction id="c69849872" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" the outstanding shares of common stock on the <em style="font: inherit;">first</em> day of the year, or a number of shares as determined by the Board of Directors.&#xa0;As of <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020, </em><ix:nonFraction id="c69849874" contextRef="i_2020-12-31_PlanNameAxis-EmployeeStockPurchasePlanMember" unitRef="Share" name="us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensationArrangementByShareBasedPaymentAwardNumberOfSharesAvailableForGrant" scale="0" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="INF">4.5</ix:nonFraction> million shares were available for future issuance. The ESPP will expire in <em style="font: inherit;"> November 2024.</em></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>

   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><b><em style="font: inherit;">9.</em> DIVIDENDS AND DIVIDEND EQUIVALENTS</b></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>Cash Dividend Program</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company has a dividend program approved by the Board of Directors,&#xa0;pursuant to which the Company intends to pay quarterly cash dividends on its common stock. Based on the Company&#x2019;s historical practice, stockholders of record as of the last business day of the quarter are entitled to receive the quarterly cash dividends when and if declared by the Board of Directors, which are payable to the stockholders in the following month.&#xa0;The Board of Directors&#xa0;declared the following cash dividends (in thousands, except per-share amounts):&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>

   <p style="font-family:'Times New Roman', Times, serif;font-size:10pt;margin:0pt;text-align:left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">As of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> December&#xa0;</em><em style="font: inherit;">31,</em>&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">2020</em> and <em style="font: inherit;">2019,</em>&#xa0;accrued dividends totaled&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849898" contextRef="i_2020-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:DividendsPayableCurrent" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">22.6</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million and&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849899" contextRef="i_2019-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:DividendsPayableCurrent" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">17.4</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million, respectively.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;<br /> The declaration of any future cash dividends is at the discretion of the Board&#xa0;of Directors and will depend on, among other things, the Company&#x2019;s financial condition, results of operations, capital requirements, business conditions, and other factors that the Board of Directors&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> may</em><i>&#xa0;</i>deem relevant, as well as a determination that cash dividends are in the best interests of the stockholders.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company anticipates&#xa0;that cash used for future dividend payments will come from its domestic cash, cash generated from ongoing U.S. operations, and&#xa0;cash repatriated from its Bermuda subsidiary. The Company also anticipates that earnings from other foreign subsidiaries will continue to be indefinitely reinvested.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>&#xa0;</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>Cash Dividend Equivalent Rights</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company's RSUs contain rights to receive cash dividend equivalents, which entitle employees who hold RSUs to the same dividend value per share as holders of common stock. The dividend equivalents are accumulated and paid to the employees when the underlying RSUs vest. Dividend equivalents accumulated on the underlying RSUs are forfeited if the employees do&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">not</em><i>&#xa0;</i>fulfill the requisite service requirement and, as a result,&#xa0;the awards do&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;">not</em><i>&#xa0;</i>vest.&#xa0;As of&#xa0;<em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020 </em>and <em style="font: inherit;">2019</em><i>,&#xa0;</i>accrued dividend equivalents totaled&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849903" contextRef="i_2020-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="mpwr:AccruedDividendEquivalents" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">11.7</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million and&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849904" contextRef="i_2019-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="mpwr:AccruedDividendEquivalents" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">10.6</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million, respectively.&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;&#xa0;&#xa0;</p>

   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt 14.7pt 0pt -3pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;<span style="text-decoration: underline; ">GILTI:</span></p>

   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt 14.7pt 0pt -3pt; text-align: left; text-indent: 0pt;">&#xa0;The Company accounts for&#xa0;GILTI as a period cost.&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin-top: 0pt; margin-bottom: 0pt;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; ">Valuation Allowance:</span></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company periodically evaluates its deferred tax assets, including a determination of whether a valuation allowance is necessary, based upon its ability to utilize the assets using a more likely than <em style="font: inherit;">not</em> analysis. The realizability of the Company&#x2019;s net deferred tax assets is dependent on its ability to generate sufficient future taxable income during periods prior to the expiration of tax attributes to fully utilize these assets. As of <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020 </em>and <em style="font: inherit;">2019,</em> the Company has evaluated the realization of its deferred tax assets and recorded a valuation allowance for assets that do <em style="font: inherit;">not</em> meet the more-likely-than-<em style="font: inherit;">not</em> recognition threshold.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <ix:exclude>
    <div class="PGFTR" style="text-align: center; width: 100%">
     <div class="hf-row">
      <div class="hf-cell PGNUM" style="text-align: center; font-size: 10pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;;">
       <em style="font: inherit;">70</em>
      </div>
     </div>
    </div>
    <hr style="PAGE-BREAK-AFTER: always; border: none; width: 100%; height: 2px; color: #000000; background-color: #000000" />
    <div class="PGHDR" style="text-align: left; width: 100%">
     <div class="hf-row">
      <div class="hf-cell TOCLink" style="display: inline-block; text-align: left;">
       <a href="#toc" style="font-weight: initial; font-style: initial; font-variant: initial; font-size: 10pt; font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif;">Table of Contents</a>
      </div>
     </div>
    </div>
   </ix:exclude>
   <ix:exclude>&#xa0;</ix:exclude>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><span style="text-decoration: underline; ">Undistributed Earnings of Subsidiaries:</span></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">The Company has analyzed its global working capital and cash requirements, and has determined that it plans to repatriate cash from its Bermuda subsidiary on an ongoing basis to fund its future U.S.-based expenditures and dividends.&#xa0; For the years ended <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020 </em>and <em style="font: inherit;">2019,</em> the Company repatriated $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849917" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31_ScheduleOfEquityMethodInvestmentEquityMethodInvesteeNameAxis-BermudaSubsidiaryMember" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:ForeignEarningsRepatriated" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-7">30</ix:nonFraction> million and $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849918" contextRef="d_2019-01-01_2019-12-31_ScheduleOfEquityMethodInvestmentEquityMethodInvesteeNameAxis-BermudaSubsidiaryMember" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:ForeignEarningsRepatriated" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-6">75</ix:nonFraction> million from its Bermuda subsidiary, respectively.&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">For all&#xa0;other foreign subsidiaries, the Company expects to indefinitely reinvest undistributed earnings to fund their&#xa0;operations and research and development. As of <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020 </em>and <em style="font: inherit;">2019,</em> the&#xa0;undistributed earnings were&#xa0;approximately&#xa0;$<ix:nonFraction id="c69849920" contextRef="i_2020-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:UndistributedEarningsOfForeignSubsidiaries" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">27.7</ix:nonFraction> million and $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849921" contextRef="i_2019-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:UndistributedEarningsOfForeignSubsidiaries" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">32.9</ix:nonFraction> million, respectively. An actual repatriation of the&#xa0;undistributed earnings&#xa0;could be subject to additional foreign withholding taxes and U.S. state taxes.&#xa0;The Company expects to be able to take a <ix:nonFraction id="c69849922" contextRef="d_2020-01-01_2020-12-31" unitRef="Pure" name="mpwr:DividendReceivedDeductionOnUndistributedEarnings" scale="-2" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="0">100</ix:nonFraction>% dividend received deduction to offset any U.S. federal income tax liability on the undistributed earnings.&#xa0;Determination of the unrecognized state and withholding deferred tax liability&#xa0;is <em style="font: inherit;">not</em> practicable at this time due to the complexities associated with the&#xa0;hypothetical calculation.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;"><i><b>Other Income Tax Provision Matters</b></i></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">As of <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020, </em>the Company did <span style="-sec-ix-hidden:c69849924">not</span> have federal net operating loss carryforwards. As of <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020, </em>the state net operating loss carryforwards for income tax purposes were $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849925" contextRef="i_2020-12-31_IncomeTaxAuthorityAxis-StateAndLocalJurisdictionMember_IncomeTaxAuthorityNameAxis-InternalRevenueServiceIRSMember" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:OperatingLossCarryforwards" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">20.2</ix:nonFraction> million, which will expire beginning in <em style="font: inherit;">2024.</em></p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">As of <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020, </em>the Company had $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849927" contextRef="i_2020-12-31_IncomeTaxAuthorityAxis-DomesticCountryMember_TaxCreditCarryforwardAxis-ResearchMember" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:TaxCreditCarryforwardAmount" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">7.1</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million R&amp;D tax credit carryforwards for federal income tax purposes, which will begin to expire in <em style="font: inherit;">2040,</em> and $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849929" contextRef="i_2020-12-31_IncomeTaxAuthorityAxis-StateAndLocalJurisdictionMember_TaxCreditCarryforwardAxis-ResearchMember" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:TaxCreditCarryforwardAmount" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">30.5</ix:nonFraction>&#xa0;million for state income tax purposes, which can be carried forward indefinitely.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">In the event of a change in ownership, as defined under federal and state tax laws, the Company's net operating loss and tax credit carryforwards could be subject to annual limitations.&#xa0;The annual limitations could result in the expiration of the net operating loss and tax credit carryforwards prior to utilization.</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">At <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2020, </em>the Company had $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849930" contextRef="i_2020-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:UnrecognizedTaxBenefits" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">33.5</ix:nonFraction> million of unrecognized tax benefits, $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849931" contextRef="i_2020-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:UnrecognizedTaxBenefitsThatWouldImpactEffectiveTaxRate" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">24.3</ix:nonFraction> million of which would affect its effective tax rate if recognized after considering the valuation allowance.&#xa0;At <em style="font: inherit;"> December 31, 2019, </em>the Company had $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849932" contextRef="i_2019-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:UnrecognizedTaxBenefits" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">25.4</ix:nonFraction> million of unrecognized tax benefits, $<ix:nonFraction id="c69849933" contextRef="i_2019-12-31" unitRef="USD" name="us-gaap:UnrecognizedTaxBenefitsThatWouldImpactEffectiveTaxRate" scale="6" format="ixt:numdotdecimal" decimals="-5">17.3</ix:nonFraction> million of which would affect its effective tax rate if recognized after considering the valuation allowance.&#xa0;</p>
   <p style="font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;, Times, serif; font-size: 10pt; margin: 0pt; text-align: left;">&#xa0;</p>
